name: DAIEISANGYO Co.,Ltd.
summary: DAIEISANGYO Co.,Ltd. engages in the condominium and housing business in Japan. The company primarily sells newly built condominiums and single-family homes. It is also involved in the development and sale of residential land; housing construction contract; and planning and sale of used homes, as well as planning, design, construction of housing renovation projects. DAIEISANGYO Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Kitakyushu, Japan.
